description: For the Asset Info UI editor stack, every editor in the stack this will be valid for, I want to add child selection controls to select a child bound to that asset and open the Asset Info editor for that child. If Shift is being held, the user should be able to hover on a child asset that is owned by the parent, turning the child blue, and if the user clicks on a hovered child, it opens the Asset Info UI for that child. I want this to work in the other direction too, so once we open the Asset Info UI for that child, we should still be able to see the parent and we can again hold Shift to select and navigate back to the parent's Asset Info UI. Implement this cleanly.

Multi spawn group selection and size scroll prevention rule. For the room editor, while Shift is being held, disable the click-to-drag asset / camera control pan. I want to implement a rectangle selection box, which will work on top of the current click to select a single asset. If the user clicks and drags, clicks an empty space and not a selectable asset, if the user clicks and drags on a selectable asset, we just select that asset, select all assets that are in the drawn selection rectangle the user draws. If multiple spawn groups are selected, we are going to disable the scroll to scale. Scroll to scale is only available for a single selected spawn group/asset. The things the user will be able to do with multiple selected assets are click to drag all of them, delete all of them on Delete, and copy and paste all of them. On paste of multi-selected assets, unselect the original selected multi assets but make the pasted ones selected. The user should not be able to click and drag to move a spawn group or multiple spawn groups until Shift is released, by the way. Upon Shift release, keep the single or multiple spawn groups selected. At that point, we can do the existing individual spawn group mouse controls and the new multi mouse controls. Make sure that if multiple spawn groups are selected, special spawn group controls like perimeter click-to-drag radius are disabled, and other things only moving the point, anchor point?, of spawn groups is what we can move when multi-selected, and delete and copy and paste. Full clean plan that will cleanly integrate multi-asset selection without breaking existing single spawn group selection mouse controls.

Issues with the task editor thing: when I click Add Task, it creates 2 empty tasks. Keyboard input affects the game / UI things in the game when typing should go just to the tasks panel. The user should be able to move the typing cursor by clicking in the textbox to move it, the text box description input.

Fix the sinking logic. It is inconsistent with camera position and it should not be changing as camera moves it needs to be based soley on the rottion chnaging only when the rotation does. find the issue and fix so that the crop posision stays the same relative to the pixles of the asset being croppeds texture and does not move when camera does. it looks close but that shifting isstill a bit of an issue.
